data.title: Mirana Ventures transferred 10,000 ETH to Bybit Deposit 31 minutes ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, about 31 minutes ago, Mirana Ventures transferred 10,000 ETH worth approximately US$27.97 million to Bybit Deposit, and the funds were subsequently transferred to the Bybit hot wallet address.

data.title: Bybit hackers have exchanged 37,900 ETH across chains for other assets, and there are currently 461,491 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Bybit hackers have used a large number of addresses to use cross-chain exchange platforms such as Chainflip, THORChain, LiFi, DLN, and eXch to exchange 37,900 ETH (US$106 million) for other assets (BTC, etc.) across chains since they started laundering coins yesterday afternoon. The Bybit hacker address currently has 461,491 ETH (US$1.29 billion), and the total amount of ETH they stole from Bybit is 499,395 (US$1.4 billion).

data.title: Lazarus Group Identified in Recent Crypto Exchange Attack
data.description: According to PANews, SlowMist founder Yu Jian revealed on the X platform that an in-depth investigation over the past 30 days has confirmed the involvement of North Korea's Lazarus Group in a state-level APT attack targeting cryptocurrency exchanges. The analysis included forensic examination and correlation tracking. Yu Jian announced the decision to share relevant Indicators of Compromise (IOCs), which include exploited IPs from cloud service providers and proxies, to assist exchanges and related platforms in conducting urgent checks. It is important to note that the disclosure does not specify which platforms were targeted, nor does it mention Bybit. Any similarities are purely coincidental.

Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 96,000 USDT with a 0.75% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 23, 2025, 12:17 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 96,000 USDT and is now trading at 95,968.25 USDT, with a narrowed 0.75% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Abraxas Capital withdrew 8,438 ETH from OKX 10 minutes ago, worth $23.59 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring, about 10 minutes ago, the Abraxas Capital marked address withdrew 8,438 ETH worth 23.59 million US dollars from the OKX hot wallet.

data.title: pump.fun's contract fee income yesterday was approximately US$1.75 million, down more than 88% from its peak in January.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to DefiLlama data, pump.fun's protocol fee income yesterday was $1.75 million, a decrease of 88.62% from the peak of $15.38 million on January 25. Pump.fun's transaction volume yesterday was $137.25 million, a decrease of 64.83% from the historical peak ($390.3 million on January 24).

data.title: BNB Drops Below 660 USDT with a Narrowed 0.52% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 23, 2025, 11:52 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 660 USDT and is now trading at 659.72998 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.52% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Mgmt marked address withdraws 20,000 ETH from Binance hot wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Arkham monitoring, about 13 minutes ago, the Abraxas Capital Mgmt mark address withdrew 20,000 ETH from the Binance hot wallet, worth 56.03 million US dollars. In addition, about 11 minutes ago, the address also withdrew 40 million USDT from the same Binance hot wallet.
